title: New surgical procedure for treatment of morbid obesity
author: Bekavac-Beslin, Miroslav
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Dear Editor, 

 I would like to inform you and your distinguished readers about a new surgical procedure for treatment of morbid obesity that we are introducing to the surgical practice at our hospital.
steps_raw:
Dear Editor,
